data.body: (literally translated 你他妈懂个鸡巴 is "your damn mom don't know dick" but in vernacular use the equivalent is "you don't know shit". 你他妈 or "Your damn mom" isn't actually about anyone's mothers, it's just used as an explicative in similar ways to "goddamn" in English)
